```{r setup, echo = FALSE, results = "hide"}
choices <- c("nominal", "ordinal", "metrisch")
```

Question
========
Which scale level is used in the first example?
`r exams::add_cloze(choices[1], choices, type = "schoice")`

Which scale level is used in the second example?
`r exams::add_cloze(choices[1], choices, type = "schoice")`

`r exams::format_metainfo("answerlist")`

Solution
========
Both examples use a nominal scale.

Meta-information
================
extype: cloze
exname: Cloze Repeated Select
exclozetype: `r exams::format_metainfo("type")`
exsolution: `r exams::format_metainfo("solution")`
extol: `r exams::format_metainfo("tolerance")`
expoints: 1|1
